claim: The character {kʸ} is rendered as '{kʸ}'. This is likely a markup issue where the curly braces are not being interpreted correctly.

all_issues.issue: The character {kʸ} is rendered as '{kʸ}'. This is likely a markup issue where the curly braces are not being interpreted correctly.
all_issues.quote: p pʸ t tʸ k {kʸ} kʷ ʔ / m n / s y w [h] [hʸ] / ɾ~l ʈ

all_issues.issue: Curly braces are escaped as HTML entities ({ and }) instead of rendering as {kʸ}. This is a formatting error likely due to improper HTML escaping.
